title: . Secretary of Labor to initiate integration of maternity leave benefits. Within six (6) months afte
content:
. Secretary of Labor to initiate integration of maternity leave benefits. Within six (6) months after 
this Code takes effect, the Secretary of Labor shall initiate such measures as may be necessary for the 
integration of maternity leave benefits into the Social Security System, in the case of private employment, and 
the Government Service Insurance System, in the case of public employment.
